title: Mythical_sword
description: This mod adds a mythical sword. Funny for manhunts.
body:
---

## 🧱 **Mythical Gear Mod**

### ⚔️ **Item 1: Mythical Sword**

- **Durability:** 10,000  
- **Attack Damage:** 30  
- **Attack Speed:** 7.5  

**Ingredients:**
- 2x mythical ingot.
- 1x stick

---

### ✨ **Item 2: Mythical ingot.**

**Ingredients:**
- 2x Netherite Ingot  
- 2x Netherite Block  
- 4x Amethyst Block  
- 1x Gold Ingot

---

### ✨ **Item 3: Mythical XP Orb**

- **Right-Click Effect:** Instantly grants **30 XP** to the player and removes the right clicked orb.
- **Stackable:** Yes (up to 64)  

**Ingredients:**
- 2x Bottle o’ Enchanting  
- 1x Golden Nugget

---

All recipes in gallery
